query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 3 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 3 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AMERICA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;

query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'CANADA' and n2.n_name = 'CHINA') or (n1.n_name = 'CHINA' and n2.n_name = 'CANADA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT n1.n_name as supp_nation, 
       n2.n_name as cust_nation, 
       EXTRACT(year FROM l_shipdate) as l_year, 
       SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
FROM supplier
JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'CANADA'
JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'CHINA'
WHERE lineitem.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

UNION ALL

SELECT n1.n_name as supp_nation, 
       n2.n_name as cust_nation, 
       EXTRACT(year FROM l_shipdate) as l_year, 
       SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as revenue
FROM supplier
JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'CHINA'
JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'CANADA'
WHERE lineitem.l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;

query: select supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, sum(volume) as revenue from ( select n1.n_name as supp_nation, n2.n_name as cust_nation, extract(year from l_shipdate) as l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume from supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2 where s_suppkey = l_suppkey and o_orderkey = l_orderkey and c_custkey = o_custkey and s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and ( (n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' and n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') or (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' and n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA') ) and l_shipdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' ) as shipping group by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year order by supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
        EXTRACT(year FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM supplier
    INNER JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
    INNER JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'FRANCE'
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        n1.n_name AS supp_nation,
        n2.n_name AS cust_nation,
        EXTRACT(year FROM l_shipdate) AS l_year,
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume
    FROM supplier
    INNER JOIN nation n1 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey AND n1.n_name = 'FRANCE'
    INNER JOIN lineitem ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN nation n2 ON customer.c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey AND n2.n_name = 'ETHIOPIA'
    WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
) AS shipping
GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year
ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

query: select c_count, count(*) as custdist from ( select c_custkey, count(o_orderkey) from customer left outer join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey and o_comment not like '%unusual%deposits%' group by c_custkey ) as c_orders (c_custkey, c_count) group by c_count order by custdist desc, c_count desc;
rewritten_query: select c_count, count(*) as custdist from ( select c_custkey, count(o_orderkey) from customer left outer join orders on c_custkey = o_custkey and o_comment not like '%unusual%deposits%' group by c_custkey ) as c_orders (c_custkey, c_count) group by c_count order by custdist desc, c_count desc;

query: select p_brand, p_type, p_size, count(distinct ps_suppkey) as supplier_cnt from partsupp, part where p_partkey = ps_partkey and p_brand <> 'Brand#33' and p_type not like 'SMALL BRUSHED%' and p_size in (28, 8, 22, 14, 19, 44, 47, 45) and ps_suppkey not in ( select s_suppkey from supplier where s_comment like '%Customer%Complaints%' ) group by p_brand, p_type, p_size order by supplier_cnt desc, p_brand, p_type, p_size;
rewritten_query: select p_brand, p_type, p_size, count(distinct ps_suppkey) as supplier_cnt from partsupp, part where p_partkey = ps_partkey and p_brand <> 'Brand#33' and p_type not like 'SMALL BRUSHED%' and p_size in (28, 8, 22, 14, 19, 44, 47, 45) and ps_suppkey not in ( select s_suppkey from supplier where s_comment like '%Customer%Complaints%' ) group by p_brand, p_type, p_size order by supplier_cnt desc, p_brand, p_type, p_size;

query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#35' and p_container = 'LG PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#35' AND p_container = 'LG PKG'
),
part_avg AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, AVG(l.l_quantity) AS avg_qty
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN filtered_parts fp ON l.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice) / 7.0 AS avg_yearly
FROM lineitem l
JOIN filtered_parts fp ON l.l_partkey = fp.p_partkey
JOIN part_avg pa ON l.l_partkey = pa.l_partkey
WHERE l.l_quantity < 0.2 * pa.avg_qty;

query: select sum(l_extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly from lineitem, part where p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#32' and p_container = 'WRAP PKG' and l_quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = p_partkey );
rewritten_query:
WITH part_avg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, 0.2 * AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice)/7.0 AS avg_yearly
FROM part
JOIN lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
JOIN part_avg ON part.p_partkey = part_avg.l_partkey
WHERE part.p_brand = 'Brand#32'
  AND part.p_container = 'WRAP PKG'
  AND lineitem.l_quantity < part_avg.avg_qty;

query: select sum(l_extendedprice* (1 - l_discount)) as revenue from lineitem, part where ( p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#21' and p_container in ('SM CASE', 'SM BOX', 'SM PACK', 'SM PKG') and l_quantity >= 3 and l_quantity <= 3 + 10 and p_size between 1 and 5 and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG') and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) or ( p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#42' and p_container in ('MED BAG', 'MED BOX', 'MED PKG', 'MED PACK') and l_quantity >= 20 and l_quantity <= 20 + 10 and p_size between 1 and 10 and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG') and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' ) or ( p_partkey = l_partkey and p_brand = 'Brand#31' and p_container in ('LG CASE', 'LG BOX', 'LG PACK', 'LG PKG') and l_quantity >= 25 and l_quantity <= 25 + 10 and p_size between 1 and 15 and l_shipmode in ('AIR', 'AIR REG') and l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON' );
rewritten_query:
SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM (
    SELECT l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM part
    JOIN lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey
        AND l_quantity BETWEEN 3 AND 13
        AND l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'AIR REG')
        AND l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON'
    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#21'
      AND p_container IN ('SM CASE', 'SM BOX', 'SM PACK', 'SM PKG')
      AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM part
    JOIN lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey
        AND l_quantity BETWEEN 20 AND 30
        AND l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'AIR REG')
        AND l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON'
    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#42'
      AND p_container IN ('MED BAG', 'MED BOX', 'MED PKG', 'MED PACK')
      AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 10
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM part
    JOIN lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey
        AND l_quantity BETWEEN 25 AND 35
        AND l_shipmode IN ('AIR', 'AIR REG')
        AND l_shipinstruct = 'DELIVER IN PERSON'
    WHERE p_brand = 'Brand#31'
      AND p_container IN ('LG CASE', 'LG BOX', 'LG PACK', 'LG PKG')
      AND p_size BETWEEN 1 AND 15
) AS combined;

query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burnished%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1996-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1996-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'GERMANY' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_sum AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, 0.5 * SUM(l_quantity) AS half_sum
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
),
burnished_parts AS (
    SELECT p_partkey
    FROM part
    WHERE p_name LIKE 'burnished%'
)
SELECT s.s_name, s.s_address
FROM nation n
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN burnished_parts bp ON ps.ps_partkey = bp.p_partkey
    JOIN lineitem_sum ls ON ps.ps_partkey = ls.l_partkey AND ps.ps_suppkey = ls.l_suppkey
    WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    AND ps.ps_availqty > ls.half_sum
)
ORDER BY s_name;

query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'spring%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1997-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'KENYA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query:
WITH lineitem_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_suppkey, SUM(l_quantity) AS total_qty
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    GROUP BY l_partkey, l_suppkey
)
SELECT s_name, s_address
FROM supplier
JOIN nation ON supplier.s_nationkey = nation.n_nationkey
WHERE nation.n_name = 'KENYA'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM partsupp
    JOIN part ON partsupp.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey
    JOIN lineitem_agg ON partsupp.ps_partkey = lineitem_agg.l_partkey
                      AND partsupp.ps_suppkey = lineitem_agg.l_suppkey
    WHERE partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
    AND part.p_name LIKE 'spring%'
    AND partsupp.ps_availqty > 0.5 * lineitem_agg.total_qty
)
ORDER BY s_name;

query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burlywood%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' order by s_name;
rewritten_query: select s_name, s_address from supplier, nation where s_suppkey in ( select ps_suppkey from partsupp where ps_partkey in ( select p_partkey from part where p_name like 'burlywood%' ) and ps_availqty > ( select 0.5 * sum(l_quantity) from lineitem where l_partkey = ps_partkey and l_suppkey = ps_suppkey and l_shipdate >= date '1994-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1994-01-01' + interval '1' year ) ) and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_name = 'ETHIOPIA' order by s_name;
